root.name: bold_specific_text
root.description: Evaluates whether only the text '85th and 94th percentiles' and '95th percentile' have been bolded, and no extraneous bolding occurred.

children.name: both_phrases_bolded
children.description: Checks that both target phrases are bolded in the modified presentation.

children.name: no_extraneous_bolding
children.description: Checks that no other text except the specified phrases has been newly bolded in the presentation.

metadata.task: Bold the text '85th and 94th percentiles' and '95th percentile'
